race_meta.race_name: BAR 1 Casino 'Slot Games & Live Casino' Mares (Pro/Am) INH Flat Race

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed kiltybo at position 2 (12.0% probability) vs top pick Poetisa (68.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~56.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Poetisa > Kiltybo, but actual result was Kiltybo > Poetisa. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Kiltybo had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -1.3%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
